untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-leg options pricing mechanics (diagonal spread with LEAPS call + short-term written call, time decay modeling, and strike proximity at expiration). These cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators. The core entry condition 'underlying near strike of written option at expiration' requires options chain data and Greeks (delta, theta) unavailable in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: price_pos_20 (0.4-0.6 range approximates 'near strike' positioning). Exit uses bearish reversal signal. However, this is a poor substitute for true diagonal spread mechanics which require options-specific data structures and cannot be backtested with equity price/volume indicators alone.
